name: Master Flank Steak Roulade
recipeIngredient: 1 thin piece marinated flank steak (about 3/4 pound)
2 cups reserved Stir-Fried Napa Cabbage Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat on a cutting board and top with cabbage mixture.
2. Spread evenly and, beginning with one of the long sides, tightly roll up the steak.
3. The finished roulade should be 2 to 2 1/2 inches in diameter. Secure with 4 toothpicks.
4. Season with salt and pepper and place on hot grill.
5. Cook to desired doneness. Watch carefully and turn as needed.
6. Let roulade cool to room temperature, then wrap well and refrigerate up to 3 days.
7. When ready to serve, remove from refrigerator.
8. Combine cream cheese, goat cheese, wasabi powder, and minced pickled ginger; mix well.
9. Place flat bread on a work surface and spread a very thin, even layer of the cheese mixture on it.
10. Remove toothpicks from roulade, then place roulade along one of the long sides of the bread.
11. Roll up the meat in the bread, keeping the roll very tight. Trim off any excess bread.
12. Wrap entire roll tightly in plastic wrap and refrigerate 30 minutes.
13. To serve: Using a serrated knife, carefully cut roll into 1/2-inch slices.
14. Serve with a green salad.
Serves 4.
